title: Cobblemon: Ball Stickers
description: Enhances Cobblemon with Gen 4-inspired and Minecraft-themed Poké Ball stickers to provide custom particle effects and release animations.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4xsaLK-CmXY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod adds stickers and sticker cases inspired by the classic Gen 4 Ball Capsule system. Collect them to customize your Pokémon’s throw-out animations with unique particle effects and sounds!

The mechanic is designed to bring a new layer of personalization to your Cobblemon experience.

![Shinx shining](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/923a6be10f4cabe51c79652dc2572bcda643c126_0.webp)

---

### Customization

Decorate your Poké Balls with over **150** different stickers to create truly unique entrance effects. 

You can combine multiple stickers to layer visuals. These range from simple 2D particles to high-tier, fully custom 3D animations with dedicated music and sound effects. **Some Examples:**

* **Frame Sticker:** Turn any Minecraft item into a custom particle effect.
* **Jukebox Sticker:** Trigger the music of any disc when your Pokémon enters battle.
* **Legendary Meteor:** Your Pokémon crashes into the field in a ball of fire.

![Stickerboxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16354b3ded67dad0fa68eb63d754e233653197e7.png)

---

### Rarity System

Stickers are categorized into five tiers. Higher tiers offer more complex animations and audio-visual depth:

* **Common & Uncommon:** Subtle particles and classic shapes.
* **Rare & Epic:** Larger effects and distinct sound cues.
* **Legendary:** Full-screen presence and unique entrance themes.

![Nature Seal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf69bb5f666bbb1e193fc7ca53ee0ed8f4887f9.png)

---

### Loot Integration

The mod integrates seamlessly into your world's progression and existing loot tables.

Stickers can be found in vanilla loot chests or as rare drops from mobs. For the most authentic experience, this mod is fully compatible with the **Underground Mining** mod, allowing you to excavate stickers using the classic mining minigame.

![Darkrai rising](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e42536eb8a9c53b5b2e6a2fcde3dd6d4a54c05b7_0.webp)

There might or might not exist a special Sticker using a remix from Zame yet again :D
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCKKKbeAhjKYJfOy5Opg8lcQ
